text: Here, amidst glass walls and the soft blue glow of technology, I feel a sense of anticipation and mild curiosity. The people moving around me seem purposeful yet relaxed. Entering the R+D space, surrounded by words about care and intentionality, I sense a gentle tug towards hope and discovery. The emphasis on research and coexistence stirs within me a philosophical pondering about progress and the spaces we create for knowledge. I am quietly optimistic, ready to reflect on how environments shape our thoughts and actions.
